articles.title: 'Welcome to Jungle' Twitter review: Netizens hail Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty starrer; call it 'brain rot family entertainer'
articles.description: The premiere of Akshay Kumar's 'Welcome to the Jungle' has drawn an overwhelmingly positive response, with viewers lauding its relentless humor and entertaining experience. This star-studded comedy is celebrated for encapsulating the frivolous essence of Bollywood. While a few critics argue it was overly prolonged and missed depth, plenty of moviegoers are eager for its box office triumph, especially those in search of unadulterated amusement.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay showcases impressive fitness at 53
articles.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay, at 53, demonstrated remarkable fitness by completing a 6km 'Start Run, Stop Drugs' marathon in Chennai. Leading thousands, including ministers and volunteers, he administered an anti-drug pledge and actively participated, even offering water to fellow runners. Videos of his energetic run and motivational presence have gone viral, highlighting his disciplined lifestyle and commitment to public awareness.

articles.description: In Welcome To The Jungle, Akshay Kumar-Raveena Tandon's scenes play more like a deliciously meta nod to their off-screen past. Farida Jalal will surprise you with her comic timing.

articles.title: Movie Dialogue of the Day from Taken: Liam Neeson's 'I don't know who you are. I don’t know what you want. I will look for you, I will find you, and I will kill you'
articles.description: Movie Dialogue of the Day: Liam Neeson's chilling monologue in the 2008 action thriller 'Taken' cemented its place in pop culture. His character, Bryan Mills, a former operative, delivers a calm yet terrifying warning to his daughter's kidnappers, showcasing his specialized skills and unwavering determination. This iconic scene, born from a father's fierce protectiveness, propelled the film to success and highlighted the powerful theme of family bonds pushing individuals beyond their limits.

articles.title: Come again: Why TV and movies are saying Yes Yes Yes to steamy scenes
articles.description: Who turned up the heat on your TV? Shows and films are back to being passionate, romance has returned, intimacy feels real. It better not fizzle out

articles.description: Actor Anjali Sivaraman, known as the "Selfie Girl," aims for diverse roles, including Catwoman and a biopic of Amrita Sher-Gil, reflecting her artistic journey.

articles.title: 'Ananthan Kaadu' box office collections day 1: Arya and Murali Gopy's film opens with Rs 65 lakh India Net
articles.description: Arya's latest political action thriller, 'Ananthan Kaadu', has opened to a modest Rs 65 lakhs net on its first day, with the Malayalam version leading collections. Despite praise for Arya's performance and Murali Gopy's writing, some reviews criticize the film for its dated approach. The movie garnered a 14% overall occupancy, with night shows showing the strongest audience interest.

articles.title: “That's huge”: Patrick Mahomes stunned fans with a surprising offseason reveal while Brittany Mahomes lands big new role
articles.description: Patrick Mahomes has Kansas City Chiefs fans talking again after a viral family photo with Brittany Mahomes sparked fresh speculation over his injury recovery. Fans quickly noticed one subtle detail that could signal a major step in Patrick Mahomes’ return ahead of training camp. At the same time, Brittany Mahomes is making headlines after landing a new Yahoo World Cup role. With Patrick Mahomes’ comeback and Brittany Mahomes’ growing sports empire, the power couple remains at the centre of the NFL offseason buzz

articles.title: Brad Pitt has 'NO PLANS' to marry Ines de Ramon
articles.description: Despite rumors of wedding bells and a baby with girlfriend Ines de Ramon, Brad Pitt reportedly has no immediate plans to settle down. Sources reveal de Ramon has become a beloved part of Pitt's family, building strong bonds with his siblings and their children, even as his own children with Angelina Jolie have distanced themselves.

articles.title: Esha Deol opens up on separation from Bharat Takhtani
articles.description: Esha Deol has spoken about separation, heartbreak and navigating life’s most personal decisions, saying she prefers to trust her own judgment and believes every experience, including mistakes, helps a person grow stronger. The actress, who announced her separation from businessman husband Bharat Takhtani in 2024, described such situations as deeply personal and sensitive, especially when children are involved.

articles.title: Kylian Mbappe leaves fans stunned with unexpected reaction to girlfriend Ester Exposito's viral pink dress
articles.description: Kylian Mbappe drew attention off the pitch after reacting to girlfriend Ester Exposito's Instagram post featuring a striking pink dress from Monte Carlo. The couple, who confirmed their relationship earlier this year, received praise from fans for supporting each other's careers despite the ongoing FIFA World Cup. Mbappe's brief but affectionate comment quickly went viral, highlighting the growing public interest in the football star's relationship alongside his pursuit of World Cup success.

articles.title: "A bunch of creeps": Taylor Swift dragged into Travis Kelce's ex Kayla Nicole's latest controversy after viral fan debate erupts
articles.description: Kayla Nicole's appearance in Cannes sparked fresh debate online after a viral post accused some Taylor Swift fans of closely tracking her public activities. The criticism drew swift responses from Swift supporters, who defended the singer and challenged the claims. The exchange reignited discussion about the intense scrutiny surrounding Nicole, Taylor Swift, and Travis Kelce, while wedding speculation involving the NFL star and the pop icon continues without any official confirmation.

articles.title: “These two do not care how they interrupt the lives of the residents": Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's rumored MSG wedding leaves New Yorkers fuming over street closures
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's reported wedding plans at Madison Square Garden have sparked criticism from some New York City residents. Reports claim the couple requested street closures and a large tent for up to 999 guests, though neither has confirmed the details. Some locals called the alleged plans disruptive, especially with July 3 festivities approaching, while others questioned whether the wedding will even take place at MSG. The reported celebration continues to generate widespread public attention.

articles.title: Bengaluru: The homes they longed to return to
articles.description: Imtiaz Ali’s latest film, ‘Main Vaapas Aaunga’, has reignited conversations about the lasting trauma of Partition. At its centre is an elderly man with dementia who is haunted by a promise he made to the woman he loved in Sargodha, now in Pakistan. The riots of 1947 forced them apart, but he had vowed to return.

articles.title: A Chinese box office hit sparks a debate about identity in Singapore
articles.description: A nostalgic tale about family, hope and hardship has opened an unexpected conversation.

articles.title: Rhea is currently single, reveals what she looks for in a partner
articles.description: Rhea Chakraborty and her brother Showik recently got candid about relationships, marriage and dating preferences during a fun conversation with Neha Dhupia and Angad Bedi. Neha then asked Rhea, who confirmed that she is currently single, about the qualities she looks for in a man. The conversation then shifted to marriage, with Neha asking the siblings who would tie the knot first.

articles.title: Session on inclusivity in art
articles.description: Rapper, songwriter and ballroom leader Jamaica Moana will discuss queer art and community-building with artist and archivist Mira Brunner.

articles.title: Lionel Richie HOSPITALISED after falling ill onstage; singer cuts short opening night of tour - WATCH
articles.description: Music legend Lionel Richie was compelled to halt the inaugural show of his North American tour in St. Paul after falling ill onstage. The 77-year-old singer, visibly struggling and taking several breaks, was eventually transported to a local hospital. His saxophonist later informed the audience that the concert could not continue due to Richie's indisposition, leaving the future of upcoming dates uncertain.

articles.title: Amitabh Bachchan’s co-star left Bollywood after just seven years. Today, she earns more than Rs 120 crore per year
articles.description: Perizaad Zorabian, known for her roles in 'Jogger's Park' and 'Bollywood Calling', transitioned from acting to lead her family's poultry business. Initially drawn to entrepreneurship and even trained in acting, her career took an unexpected turn after a chance encounter led to modeling and then Bollywood. Post-marriage, she successfully expanded the poultry enterprise into a significant empire, now employing 700 people and generating substantial revenue.

articles.title: Airbag deployment kills 25-year-old inside parked car near Mumbai
articles.description: 25-year-old Mohit Soni dies in Mira Road after a parked Honda’s steering-wheel airbag deploys suddenly; Kashimira police probe suspected technical failure.

articles.title: Shah Rukh Khan celebrates 34 years of Deewana in childhood city Mangalore, dances to Jhoome Jo Pathaan and greets fans in Kannada
articles.description: As Shah Rukh Khan marked the 34th anniversary of his Bollywood debut Deewana, the superstar chose to celebrate the milestone in a city that holds a special place in his heart — Mangalore, where he spent the first five years of his life. The actor, who made his big-screen debut in director Raj Kanwar's 1992 romantic drama Deewana, received a grand welcome from fans in the Karnataka city on June 25.

articles.title: Bus shelters in bad shape
articles.description: Thiruvananthapuram bus shelters are dilapidated and unsafe, with collapsed roofs at major stops; commuters urge Corporation and state to fix facilities.

articles.title: SHRC directs construction of sewage treatment plant
articles.description: Kerala SHRC orders STP at Karode housing complex for rehabilitated fishermen, citing sewage discharge; Rs 80 lakh earmarked, completion due in 2 months.
